metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.5-beta.7
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Applies the official PsyReaSFX brand palette and packaged app icon. - Rebuilds About as a minimal branded product card. - Isolates Artwork ownership per physical source folder. - Adds source-folder commands to choose, rediscover, or clear Artwork. - Prevents one source cover from propagating across a multi-source library.
